update.releaseNotes:
v5.7.1 - Changelog
New --- - Add `Enable Swipe-Based Scrolling` toggle to the `Settings` page that scrolls in-game lists by swiping instead of detecting the in-game scrollbar. It is disabled by default. - Add `Trackblazer Force-Train Energy Floor (Summer/Finale)` scenario override to the `Scenario Overrides Settings` page. During Summer and the Finale the `Trackblazer` scenario normally always picks training, but if energy is at or below this floor the bot falls through to the standard decision flow so items are not queued for a training with little hope of success.
Adjustments --- - Update game data up to `Sweep Tosho` (2026-06-03). - Read purchased `Trackblazer` shop items via the new purchased badge anchor so already-bought items are detected reliably. - Always run `Trackblazer` scheduled races regardless of critical energy or consecutive-race limits and/or related settings so an agenda race is never skipped.
Fixes --- - Fix leftover stale option IDs and routing in the in-app settings search so results jump to the correct page.
